description: Returns all Action Plan Items for a given Project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Elements per page

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_section_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Section(s).

parameters.name: filters[plan_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[query]
parameters.description: Return item(s) containing search query

parameters.name: filters[due_at]
parameters.description: Return item(s) due within the specified date range.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_party_id_or_role_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Assignee party ID(s) or role ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[attachment_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference attachment ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[drawing_revision_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference drawing revision ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[file_version_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference file version ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[plan_test_record_request_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Test Record Request ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[specification_section_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference specification section id ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[verification_method_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Assignee verification method ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[generic_tool_item_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference Generic Tool Item ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[form_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference Form ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[meeting_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference Meeting ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[observation_item_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference Observation Item ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[submittal_log_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference submittal log ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[record_checklist_template_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified checklist template id.

parameters.name: filters[record_generic_tool_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Generic Tool ID.

parameters.name: filters[reference_type]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan reference type(s)

parameters.name: filters[status_id]
parameters.description: Array of Status IDs. A single Status ID is also accepted.

created_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item was created

description.description: Description of the Action Plan Item

due_at.description: Due Date of the Action Plan Item

holding_type.description: Action Plan Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

is_blocked.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocked by another Action Plan Item

is_blocking.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocking other Action Plan Items

notes.description: Notes for the Action Plan Item

plan_id.description: Plan ID the Action Plan Item belongs to

position.description: Position of the Action Plan Item

plan_section_id.description: Action Plan Section ID the Item belongs to

title.description: Title of the Action Plan Item

id.description: Status ID for the Action Plan Item (1 - open, 2 - in_progress, 3 - delayed, 4 - closed)

template_item_id.description: Template Item ID the Action Plan Item originated from

updated_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item was updated
